---
page-layout: full
---

<div class="home-hero">
  <div>
    <img class="profile-photo" src="https://voxchina.org/uploads/article/202409/01/1725193086325232.jpg" alt="Portrait of Hyuk-soo Kwon">
  </div>
  <div class="home-intro">
    <h1 class="home-name">Hyuk-soo Kwon</h1>
    <div class="home-position">Assistant Professor<br>Harris School of Public Policy<br>University of Chicago</div>

    <p><strong>Thanks for visiting!</strong></p>

    <p>I am an Assistant Professor at the University of Chicago's Harris School of Public Policy. Before joining Harris, I was a Postdoctoral Fellow at the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research (SIEPR). I earned my Ph.D. in Economics from Cornell University in 2023.</p>

    <p>My research primarily centers around Environmental and Energy Economics and Industrial Organization.</p>

    <div class="contact-block">
      <div><span class="contact-label">Address:</span><br>Keller Center, #2061<br>1307 E 60th St, Chicago, IL 60637</div>
      <div style="margin-top: .75rem;"><span class="contact-label">Email:</span><br>hskwon.econ@gmail.com</div>
      <a class="cv-button" href="files/CV.pdf" target="_blank">CV</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
